== Notes for [[Item:Q91337|Q91337]] ==

ID: I82396

Name: Absalom of Judea

Given Name: Absalom

Surname: of Judea

Sex: M

_UID: 4525ABAA873A9247B5AF831F770357C0F0ED

Change Date: 6 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: John Hycanus Maccabeus of Judea

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

of Judea

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I82396

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
